Drozq - Joshua Guerrero, Irvine Listing Agent

Joshua Guerrero is a licensed California REALTOR® specializing in Irvine residential real estate sales and seller representation. Affiliated with Real Brokerage Technologies. CA DRE #02267255.

About
Drozq is the brand of Joshua Guerrero, a solo Irvine real estate agent serving Irvine, CA and surrounding Orange County markets. The business specializes in listing agent services, home valuations, and seller representation. Office located at 17875 Von Karman Ave, Suite 150, Irvine, CA 92614.

Service Area
Primary: Irvine, CA (all neighborhoods including Turtle Rock, Woodbridge, Northwood, Quail Hill, Shady Canyon, University Park, Portola Springs, Stonegate, Orchard Hills, Westpark, and Oak Creek)
Secondary: Orange County cities including Newport Beach, Tustin, Costa Mesa, Santa Ana, Lake Forest, Mission Viejo, and Aliso Viejo

Services

Free home valuations for Irvine homeowners
Listing agent services (3% commission standard)
Strategic pricing analysis using Irvine MLS data
Marketing and showing coordination
Negotiation on behalf of seller
Closing coordination

Contact
